hero.subtitle: JEMP creates your personal training plan — tailored to your sport, your level, and your equipment.

features.subtitle: No generic training plan. Everything is based on your profile.

items.title: Sport-specific
items.description: Whether boxer, sprinter, or basketball player — your plan is tailored to your sport.

items.title: Level-adaptive
items.description: The system evaluates your current level and scales with you as you improve.

items.title: Your Equipment
items.description: Only exercises you can do with the equipment you actually have.

items.title: Track Progress
items.description: See how you improve week by week — with clear metrics.

features.centerSubtitle: Personalized down to the last detail.

earlyAccess.subtitle: Download JEMP for free and start with your personal training plan.

creatorCta.subtitle: Create content for the fastest growing fitness app and work directly with us.

intro.title: Become a JEMP UGC Creator
intro.description: Create content for the fastest growing fitness app. Download JEMP, record an authentic UGC video of your training with the app, and apply here with it.

socials.title: Social Media Channels
socials.subtitle: Paste the links to your profiles — the platform is detected automatically (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, …).
socials.noAccounts: Please add at least one social media channel.

portfolio.title: Your Application Video & Motivation
portfolio.videoLabel: Link to your JEMP UGC application video (e.g., Drive/TikTok/Insta)
portfolio.descLabel: Briefly describe who you are and why you're a perfect fit
portfolio.descPlaceholder: I am a creator and love fitness...

review.title: Review Application
review.subtitle: Please double-check your details before submitting.

success.title: Application Received!
success.subtitle: Thank you for your application. We will get back to you shortly.

errors.required: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.invalidProfileUrl: Please enter a valid profile link (e.g., instagram.com/yourname).
errors.duplicateSocial: This account has already been added.
errors.emailExists: An application with this email address has already been submitted.
errors.atLeastOneSocial: Please add at least one social media channel.
errors.submitFailed: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
